name: OBDX Full QA Pipeline (Drive → Test Data → Cases → Spec → Run → Jira)

nodes.name: Drive Trigger (new file)
nodes.notes: Watches the folder ID set in workflow variable DRIVE_WATCH_FOLDER_ID. Fires on every new file; the If node below filters to *__GO.txt only.

nodes.name: Load Project Context
nodes.notes: Reads CLAUDE.md + .claude/skills/{obdx-25.1-framework, qa-test-case-writer, playwright-script-writer}/*.md once. Each Build Stage-N Prompt node pulls its subset via $('Load Project Context').first().json.projectContext.

parameters.queryString: ='{{ $json.driveFolderId }}' in parents and (name contains '__FSD' or name contains '__RSD' or name contains '__REQ') and trashed = false

nodes.name: Drive: List sibling docs
nodes.notes: Lists FSD/RSD/REQ siblings of the GO marker. The downstream Code node picks the one for the current slug.

nodes.name: Pick FSD / RSD / REQ by slug
Extract text from doc
nodes.notes: Handles .md / .txt / .pdf via the built-in extractor. Google Docs are converted to text/plain by the Download node.

nodes.name: Claude — Stage 0 (Digest)
nodes.notes: Runs the Claude Code CLI in print mode. Auth lives in /home/node/.claude (persistent volume); model overridable via CLAUDE_MODEL env.

nodes.name: HITL — wait for QA approval
nodes.notes: Workflow pauses here. QA reviews/edits the staged JSON at stagingPath, then GETs the resume URL printed in the prior node's output (or POSTs JSON to override the test_cases).

nodes.name: Run Scraper
nodes.notes: Drives the live OBDX AUT through the happy path. On exit != 0, the next node throws and the workflow halts before spec/POM generation.

parameters.command: ={{ 'cd "' + $('Write spec file').first().json.projectPath + '" && npx playwright test "' + $('Write spec file').first().json.specRelative + '" --reporter=list,json,html' }}

nodes.name: Run Playwright suite
nodes.notes: Runs only the newly-generated spec to keep cycle time tight. Drop the file filter to run the full suite.

nodes.name: Jira: Create Bug
nodes.notes: Creates one Bug per failed test. Description must be ADF JSON for Jira Cloud.

main.node: Pick FSD / RSD / REQ by slug
